risk_title: Political and Governance Risk Remains High
risk_summary: Political and governance risk is rated as High across all assessment periods (approval, last approved rating, and proposed rating), indicating persistent governance fragility affecting project implementation.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance High High High

risk_title: Staffing Gaps in Conflict-Affected Regions Impeding Implementation
risk_summary: Severe staffing shortages in newly established regions (Southwest Ethiopia at 26% staffing, South Ethiopia with recruitment delays) are hindering project implementation capacity and oversight in these areas.
evidence_quote: SW Ethiopia has only 26% staffing, and South Ethiopia faces delays in recruiting a Procurement specialist. Increased attention to staffing issues in these regions is urged.

risk_title: Low Implementation Progress in Newly Established Regions
risk_summary: Rural WASH performance in newly established regions is significantly below target (Southwest Ethiopia 27%, South Ethiopia 46%, Central Ethiopia 51%), indicating implementation challenges that may be linked to governance and security concerns in these areas.
evidence_quote: While the performance in most of the regions are over 60% the performance in the newly established regions is low (Southwest Ethiopia 27%, South Ethiopia 46% and Central Ethiopia 51%) and needs special attention and closer follow up and support.

risk_title: Institutional Capacity Constraints in Slow-Performing Regions
risk_summary: NWTT and RWSCs in slow-performing regions require revitalization, indicating governance and institutional capacity challenges affecting project delivery in fragile areas.
evidence_quote: The Program is receiving enhanced governance from NWSC and RWSC, but NWTT and RWSCs in slow-performing regions need revitalization.
